title: feature request - link connection panel to tab
author: TonyRoo2
body_snippet:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->
feature request, it is very annoying (and dangerous) to have the connection panel links not affect the tab; I constantly am clicking on the server/connection in the connections panel and then think I am now working on that server, as it is has been chosen and is highlighted, but I am not; I have done work on the incorrect server several times because of this.  If a server/connection is chosen in the connection panel and there i...

iterations.description: New feature to link the connection panel to the currently active tab for improved usability and navigation.
Bulk verified: commit a8c471be exists (HIGH confidence)

comments.author: TonyRoo2
comments.snippet: to add to/clarify the above, I have since realized that if I double-click a connection in the connection panel, it does go to the already open tab of that connection; I think a single click should also do this if the tab is open already, as otherwise a connection can be highlight in the panel yet not be the active tab.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage (gemini): New feature to link the connection panel to the currently active tab for improved usability and navigation.
Approach: Implement modifications in ConnectionTab to manage a reference to a ConnectionTree panel, dynamically updating its content based on the active connection within the tab. Adjust PanelBinder to establish and maintain this connection between the tab and the panel.
